action.command: for dir in /workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-0 /workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-1 /workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-2 /workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-3; do for f in "$dir"/*.sysu.c; do /workspace/YatCC/llvm/install/bin/clang -cc1 -dump-tokens "$f" 2>&1 | grep -oP "^[\w_]+"; done; done | sort -u

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "for dir in /workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-0 /workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-1 /workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-2 /workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-3; do for f in \"$dir\"/*.sysu.c; do /workspace/YatCC/llvm/install/bin/clang -cc1 -dump-tokens \"$f\" 2>&1 | grep -oP \"^[\\w_]+\"; done; done | sort -u", "timeout": 120}

summary: terminal: {"command": "for dir in /workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-0 /workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-1 /workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-2 /workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-3; do for f in \"$dir\"/*.sysu.c; do /workspace/YatCC/llvm/install/bin/clang -cc1 -dump-tokens \"$f\" 2>&1 | grep -oP \"^[\\w_]+\"; done; done | sort -u", "timeout": 120}
